title: No Farmland Trampling
description: This mod disables farmland trampling from entities falling/jumping on the farmland.
body:
# Description
This mod disables farmland trampling, allowing your crops to be safe from both you and any mobs or animals that wander on your fields. This mod is ideal for those who have large crop fields but don't want to deal with the random dirt patches left from entities wandering around.

## Togglability

There are two ways to toggle this mod. Through the compatible mod "Mod Menu" or through the built-in custom command. The command to change the crop's level of protection is:
> /tramplingProtection [level]

It is initially set to FULL, preventing trampling from everything. There are four levels of protection for your farmland to choose from:
- Protected from everything (FULL)
- Protected from mobs but not the player (ONLY_MOBS)
- Protected from players but not mobs (ONLY_PLAYERS)
- Protected from nothing (NONE)
